creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: makc
Date: Fri Mar 28 20:40:25 2014
New Revision: 349459
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/349459
QAT: https://qat.redports.org/buildarchive/r349459/

Log:
  irc/konversation-kde4:
  - update to 1.5.0 [1]
  - convert to USES=tar:xz
  - squeeze MASTER_SITE/MASTER_SITE_SUBDIR
  
  PR:		based on ports/187720 [1]
  Submitted by:	Matthew Rezny <matthew@reztek.cz>

Modified:
  head/irc/konversation-kde4/Makefile
  head/irc/konversation-kde4/distinfo
  head/irc/konversation-kde4/pkg-plist

Modified: head/irc/konversation-kde4/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/irc/konversation-kde4/Makefile	Fri Mar 28 20:22:31 2014	(r349458)
+++ head/irc/konversation-kde4/Makefile	Fri Mar 28 20:40:25 2014	(r349459)
@@ -2,20 +2,19 @@
 # $FreeBSD$
 
 PORTNAME=	konversation
-PORTVERSION=	1.4
-PORTREVISION=	3
+PORTVERSION=	1.5
 CATEGORIES=	irc kde
-MASTER_SITES=	${MASTER_SITE_KDE}
-MASTER_SITE_SUBDIR=	stable/${PORTNAME}/${DISTVERSION}/src
+MASTER_SITES=	KDE/stable/${PORTNAME}/${DISTVERSION}/src
 
 MAINTAINER=	makc@FreeBSD.org
 COMMENT=	User friendly IRC client for KDE
 
 LIB_DEPENDS=	libqca.so:${PORTSDIR}/devel/qca
 
-USE_XZ=		yes
-USES=		cmake
+USES=		cmake:outsource gettext shebangfix tar:xz
 USE_KDE4=	kdeprefix pimlibs automoc4
 USE_QT4=	qmake_build moc_build rcc_build uic_build
 
+SHEBANG_FILES=	data/scripts/mail
+
 .include <bsd.port.mk>
